title: Different Breed Cron Heartbeat
description: Two file formats: heartbeat.json (current state map, overwritten) and heartbeat.jsonl (append-only history, one event per line).

job.description: Stable identifier — e.g. daily-schedule-story, email-campaign, schedule-fetch

host.description: Machine that ran the job — e.g. mac-mini-noah, joey-macbook

summary.description: Human-readable one-liner — what happened, what got posted/sent, what failed.

ref.description: URL to the artifact this run produced — Upload-Post job page, Resend message id, rendered MP4 path, etc.

current_state_entry.description: One entry per job in heartbeat.json. Reflects the latest run only.

last_success_at.description: Most recent SUCCESSFUL run, even if the latest run failed.

heartbeat.json.description: Map of job-id to current_state_entry. Overwritten on every cron run.

heartbeat.jsonl.description: Newline-delimited JSON. One #/definitions/event object per line. Append-only. Truncate periodically (e.g. keep last 90 days).
